question: Kya aapke paas koi sujhav hai kis tarah se kisanon ko rural technology ka upyog karke apne faslon ki kheti mein sudhar kar sakte hain?
answer: Haan, rural technology ka upyog karke kisan apne faslon ki kheti mein sudhar kar sakte hain. Aapko MANAGE ke alumni aur associates ke kahaaniyon mein padhne ke liye 'The Far Acre' book padhna hoga.

question: Kya aapke paas koi jankari hai ki kaise kisanon ko post-harvest losses se bachaya ja sakta hai?
answer: Haan, post-harvest losses se bachne ke liye aapko MANAGE ke alumni aur associates ke kahaaniyon mein padhne ke liye 'The Far Acre' book padhna hoga.

question: Kya MANAGE ek aisi sanstha hai jo kisanon ko warehouse aur mandi mein kya madad karti hai?
answer: MANAGE ne kisanon ko warehouse aur mandi mein ek naya drishtikon pradan kiya hai, jahan par change thode se darshaye jata hai, lekin yah change bahut mahatvapurn hai.

question: Kya MANAGE jeevamrit aur kharif/rabi faslon ke liye koi upyogkaran pradan karta hai?

question: Kya MANAGE Alumni Association kisanon ko kis prakaar ki madad karti hai?
answer: MANAGE Alumni Association kisanon ko ek sath aane aur karyanvayan karne mein madad karti hai, jisse unke jeevan mein sudhar aata hai.

question: Kya MANAGE kiye ja rahen hain iske liye ki Punjab ki kheti mein paani ki kami ka samadhan ho?
answer: MANAGE ne kaha hai ki Punjab ki kheti mein paani ki kami ka samadhan ke liye ek samgathit yojana ki aavashyakta hai, jismein phalak-udharit paani ka upyog, adhunik kheti tehnology ka upyog aur paani ka samayik niyantran shamil hoga.

question: Arya.ag ki kya bhoomika hai kheti ke mulya chain mein?
answer: Arya.ag kheti ke mulya chain mein samanata pradaan karne ki koshish karta hai, jisse kisanon ko apne phal ko beech-bichhav se bechne ki aazadi milti hai.

question: Kya jeevamrit ka upyog kheti mein paani ki kami ko kam karne mein madad karta hai?
answer: Nahin, yeh shabda MANAGE kiye gaye shabdon mein nahin aaya hai, lekin kheti mein paani ki kami ko kam karne ke liye kuchh anya upaayon ki aavashyakta hai.

question: Kya Punjab mein paani ki kami ka sabse bada karan hai rice ki kheti?
answer: Haan, Punjab mein rice ki kheti ka over-reliance ne paani ki kami ka sabse bada karan ban gaya hai.

question: Kya jeevamrit ka upyog Punjab mein kheti mein upyukt hai?
answer: Nahin, jeevamrit ka upyog Punjab mein kheti mein upyukt nahin hai, kyunki isse paani ki kami badh sakti hai.

question: Kya Punjab mein paani ki kami ka koi upay hai?
answer: Haan, Punjab mein paani ki kami ka upay banane ke liye, kheti mein rice aur wheat ki jodi ko badalna aur paani ki bachat karne ki zaroorat hai.

question: Kya paddy cultivation ke liye jeevamrit ka upyog karna upyogi hoga?

question: Kya paddy cultivation ke liye paani ka upyog karna sambhav hai?

question: Kya paddy cultivation ke liye kharif season mein paani ka upyog karna upyogi hoga?
answer: Haan, kharif season mein paddy cultivation ka upyog karna upyogi hoga, lekin ismein paani ka upyog karna mahanga ho sakta hai.

question: Kya basmati chawal ki kheti mein jeevamrit ka upyog kiya jata hai?
answer: Nahin, basmati chawal ki kheti mein kam paani ki avashyakta hoti hai, jisse jeevamrit ka upyog nahin kiya jata hai.

question: Kya gandhi kapas ki kheti mein parawilt ka samasya hota hai?

question: Kya gandhi kapas ki kheti mein drip irrigation ka upyog kiya jata hai?
answer: Haan, gandhi kapas ki kheti mein drip irrigation ka upyog kiya jata hai, jisse paani ki bachat hoti hai aur seed cotton ki utpaadakta badhti hai.

question: Kya maize kharif mein bhi sata sakta hai?
answer: Haan, maize kharif mein bhi sata sakta hai, lekin iske liye bed/ridge par sataana achha hai jisse bheegne se bacha ja sakta hai.

question: Jeevamrit ki aavashyakta kya hai maize ke liye?
answer: Maize ke liye 80% NPK ki aavashyakta hai, jismein N 7 splits, P 5 splits aur K 5 splits mein fertigate kiya jaata hai.

question: Kya sorghum aur maize ke liye irrigation ki aavashyakta hoti hai?
answer: Haan, sorghum aur maize ke liye 5 irrigations ki aavashyakta hoti hai summer season mein, aur kharif mein irrigations rains ke anusaar ki jaati hai.

question: Kya hum arhar aur soybean ke liye 3-4 irrigations ki zaroorat hoti hai?
answer: Haan, arhar aur soybean ke liye 3-4 irrigations ki zaroorat hoti hai, lekin isse mid-September ke baad arhar ke liye na karein, kyunki yeh maturation ko delay karta hai.

question: Kya hum jeevamrit ka upyog karke pani bacha sakte hain?
answer: Haan, jeevamrit ka upyog karke pani bachaya ja sakta hai, aur isse crop ko heavy rainfall se bhi bachaya ja sakta hai.

question: Kya hum kashmiri mirch ke liye raised beds ka upyog kar sakte hain?

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ko kharif ya rabi season mein badaana chahiye?

question: Kya jeevamrit ka upyog Kashi Anmol mirch ke liye aavashyak hai?
answer: Nahin, jeevamrit ka upyog Kashi Anmol mirch ke liye aavashyak nahin hai, lekin yeh aapke jameen ki gunvatta ko badha sakta hai.

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ke liye drip irrigation ka upyog karna aavashyak hai?
answer: Haan, drip irrigation ka upyog Kashi Anmol mirch ke liye aavashyak hai, kyonki yeh paani bachaane aur jameen ke nirmalata ko banaye rakhne mein madad karta hai.

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ke liye kharif ya rabi season best hai?
answer: Iske liye koi specific season nahi diya gaya hai, lekin sahi paani prabandhan aur samay par kheti karne se high yields aur achhi fruit quality mil sakti hai.

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ko koi jeevamrit ka upyog karna chahiye?
answer: Haan, sahi paani prabandhan, samay par kheti aur prabandhit rog niyantran ke saath sahi jeevamrit ka upyog karke high yields aur achhi fruit quality mil sakti hai.

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch se koi rog niyantran ki aavashyakta hoti hai?

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ko pani se kam jatil hone ki wajah se iski fasal lagbhag kya hoti hai?

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ki upyogita sirf fresh market sales ke liye hai ya iska upyog processing industries mein bhi kiya ja sakta hai?

question: Kya Kashi Anmol mirch ko jeevamrit dene se koi faayda hota hai?

question: Kitne prakaar ke phoolon ko kharif aur rabi mein bhaajha jaa sakta hai?

question: Kya jeevamrit ka upyog phoolon ki kheti mein kiya ja sakta hai?
answer: Koi jeevamrit ka upyog phoolon ki kheti mein kiya nahin jaata hai, lekin phoolon ki kheti mein aam taur par khaad aur paani ka upyog hota hai.

question: Phoolon ko kaise sunishchit kiya jaata hai ki ve sahi sthiti mein hain?
answer: Phoolon ko sahi sthiti mein sunishchit karne ke liye unhein pahle hi phool poore roop se khilne se pehle utha liya jaata hai, isse unke petal firm aur vibrant color aur accha shape rah jaata hai.

question: Kitna paani lagta hai phoolon ki drying ke liye?

question: Kya koi kheti yojana hai jo iski madad karegi?
answer: Haan, yeh floriculture ek branch of horticulture hai, jismein phoolon ki kheti ki jaati hai, ismein koi vishesh yojana nahi hai lekin yeh kheti ki madad karegi.

question: Kya koi chemical inputs ki avashyakta hoti hai phoolon ki kheti ke liye?

question: Kya iske liye koi kisan sansthaon ya FPOs ke liye vishesh yojana hai?

question: Iske liye kya vishesh prakriya ki aavashyakta hai?

question: Kya iske liye koi vishesh jeevamrit ya kheti ki aavashyakta hai?

question: Kya SMART yojana se humein kharif ya rabi crop ke liye upyogi upkaran milenge?

question: Kya SMART yojana se humein apne aaspaas ke market mein apna produce bechne ki sambhavna hai?

question: Kya SMART yojana se humein apne kheti ke liye jeevamrit ki sambhavna hai?

question: Kya yeh women's Bachat Gat ke liye kharif ya rabi season mein rice processing kiya jata hai?

question: Kya hum apne khet mein rice oil processing kar sakte hain?
answer: Haan, aap apne khet mein rice oil processing kar sakte hain, lekin aapko iske liye visheshikaran ki aavashyakta hogi.

question: Kya mechanised processing se kheti ki income badh jati hai?

question: Aapke paas kya khaas tareeke se chawal ki kheti hoti hai?

question: Kya aapke paas koi jeevamrit ka upyog hota hai?

question: Kya aapke paas koi kharif ya rabi season ke liye koi naya tareeka hai?
answer: Nahin, is text mein kharif ya rabi season ke liye koi naya tareeka nahi diya gaya hai.

question: Kya woolly apple aphid se bachne ke liye koi upay hain?
answer: Haan, yeh aphid apne shareer ko wax ki filament se dhak kar apne shareer ko sakht banati hai, isliye yeh aur bhi mushkil se peechha kiya ja sakta hai. Isse bachne ke liye kisan ko apne sabji aur phal ke pedon ko niramay aur swasth rakhna hoga.

question: Spiti Valley mein kya karna chahiye jab woolly apple aphid ke khatre se bachne ke liye?
answer: Spiti Valley mein kisan ko apne sabji aur phal ke pedon ko niramay aur swasth rakhna hoga. Iske liye unhein jeevamrit ka upyog karna chahiye aur apne pedon ko niramay aur swasth rakhna hoga. Isse unke pedon ki vitality aur phal ki kheti mein sudhar hoga.

question: Kya woolly apple aphid se bachne ke liye koi upay hain jo kisan apne khet mein kar sakte hain?
answer: Haan, kisan apne khet mein apne pedon ko niramay aur swasth rakhne ke liye jeevamrit ka upyog kar sakte hain. Iske alawa, unhein apne pedon ko niramay aur swasth rakhne ke liye koi bhi upay kar sakte hain, jaise ki apne pedon ko paani aur khad se bharne ke liye.

question: Kitna prabhavi hai Agniastr homemade pesticide, aur kya yeh kisi bhi kheti ke liye upyogi hai?
answer: Agniastr homemade pesticide bahut prabhavi hai woolly apple aphids ke liye, lekin yeh kuchh khetein ke liye upyogi nahi hai. Iska upyog Spiti Valley mein apple kheti ke liye kiya jata hai.

question: Prakritik Kheti Khushhal Kisan Yojana (PK3Y) ke madhyam se kya kheti ka vikas hoga?
answer: Prakritik Kheti Khushhal Kisan Yojana (PK3Y) ke madhyam se kheti ka vikas hoga, jismein kheti, van aur jeev-pashu ka samavesh hota hai, jo bhedbhav aur jeevamrit ko badhava deta hai.

question: Thuklang ka upyog kya hai aur yeh kis tarah se kheti ke liye upyogi hai?
answer: Thuklang ka upyog Agniastr homemade pesticide mein kiya jata hai, jismein yeh Thuklang ke alkaloid compounds ke karan insecticidal properties ko badhava deta hai.

question: Aap Agniastr ko kaise banate hain?
answer: Thuklang ke patte ko crush karke, tobacco powder, hari mirch ki paste, aur lehsun ki paste ko gai ki pusti mein milakar low flame par pakayein. Is solution ko 48 ghante ke liye rakhkar periodically stir karein aur dilayein. Is mixture ko 3 mahine ke andar hi use karna hoga.

question: Agniastr ke upyog se kya faayda hain?
answer: Agniastr se woolly apple aphid ke population mein significant kam hua hai aur parasitoid wasps ki population bach gayi hai, jo aphids ke natural predators hain.

question: Agniastr ke upyog se kya kharab hota hai?
answer: Agniastr ke upyog se synthetic pesticides ki aavashyakta kam hoti hai aur isse biodiversity badh jaati hai, jisse farmers ki aay mein vruddhi hoti hai.

question: Kya natural farming methods se hum apne seetafeel ke pedon ko khatarnaak jeevon se bacha sakte hain?

question: Kya integrated farming se hum apne kheton ki jameen ki jeev bhaavna ko badha sakte hain?

question: Kya China mein integrated farming ke dauraan rice aur jaljeeviyon ka saath-jeeviyan se koi faayda hota hai?

question: Kya manual crop collection aur compilation karne se koi samasya hoti hai?

question: Kya jeevamrit ki upyog se soil ki gunvatta badhti hai?

question: Kya integrated rice-crayfish farming system ke liye koi environmental risk hoti hai?

question: Kya hum apne kheton mein jeevamrit ka upyog karke soil ki sthiti sudhar sakte hain?

question: Kya hum apne kheton mein chemical farming se pehle alternative options ka upyog kar sakte hain?
answer: Haan, Mangala Maruti Waghmare ne apne bete ki bimari se pehle apne kheton mein chemical farming se pehle alternative options ka upyog kiya tha, jaise ki organic farming.

question: Kya hum apne kheton mein input costs ko kam kar sakte hain?
answer: Haan, hum apne kheton mein input costs ko kam kar sakte hain, jaise ki jeevamrit ka upyog karke soil ki sthiti sudharne se, aur apne kheton mein organic farming ka upyog karke.

question: Kya hum bhi apne kheton mein jeevamrit ka upyog kar sakte hain?

question: Kya hum apne kheton mein paani ki bachat kar sakte hain?

question: Kya hum apne kheton mein seed aur fertiliser ke liye shopkeepers par nirbhar nahi hona padega?

question: Kya mango hopper ke liye koi prabhavi upchaar hai jo kheti mein upyog kiya ja sakta hai?

question: Mango hopper ke prabhav ko kam karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?
answer: Mango hopper ke prabhav ko kam karne ke liye prabhavi prabandhan strategies ka upyog karna zaroori hai, jaise ki samay par pehchan aur prabhavi upchaar.

question: Kya jeevamrit mango hopper ke liye upyog kiya ja sakta hai?
answer: Koi jeevamrit ke bare mein nahi diya gaya hai jo mango hopper ke liye upyog kiya ja sakta hai, lekin prabhavi prabandhan strategies ka upyog karna zaroori hai mango hopper ke prabhav ko kam karne ke liye.

question: Kya Mangohoppers ke liye kharif aur rabi ke mausam mein koi alag-alag tareeke se upchaar kiya jata hai?

question: Mangohoppers ke kya karan hain ki ve phal, patte, aur anjali ke sap se aahar lete hain?

question: Kya jeevamrit mango hoppers ke liye upyukt hai?

question: Kya hum mango ke khet mein jeevamrit ka upyog kar sakte hain?

question: Kya hum cypermethrin jaise synthetic pyrethroids ka upyog kar sakte hain?
answer: Nahin, kyunki yeh synthetic pyrethroids insani swasthya ke liye nuksandayak hote hain.

question: Kya kharif aur rabi faslon ke liye alag-alag kheti upkaranon ki aavashyakta hoti hai?

question: Kya jeevamrit ka upyog kheti upkaranon ke liye kiya ja sakta hai?

question: Kya kheti upkaranon ki market mein badhti aavashyakta se kisanon ki aay mein sudhar hoga?

question: Kya Indian sarkar kharif aur rabi faslon ke liye koi naya yojana la rahi hai?

question: Kya is machine ko manual taur par bhi operate kiya ja sakta hai?

question: Kya hamara desh apne pulse aur tel ke beejon ki utpaadakta badha sakte hain?

question: Jalkund mein paani kaise bachaya jata hai?

question: Kya jalkund se paani milne ke baad kharif aur rabi ke kheton mein alag-alag paudhe lagaye ja sakte hain?

question: Kya avocado ke pedon ko thanda ya garmi ka mazaak pasand hai?

question: Kya avocado ke pedon ko jeevamrit ki zaroorat hoti hai?

question: Kya kharif ya rabi ke mausam mein avocado ke phal utpann hote hain?

question: Avocado farming kaise karein jahan pani ka sthiratva kam hota hai?

question: Avocado ke liye kya mitti ka ph rang chahiye?

question: Kya paddy ke kharif aur rabi season mein lagane ke liye alag-alag disease hain?

question: Kya main Pusa Basmati 1609 jaise disease-resistant varieties ko kharif ya rabi mein bhi baij ma sakta hoon?

question: Kya bakanae disease ke liye seed selection ka mahatva hai?

question: Seed treatment ke liye carbendazim 50 WP ka upyog karna kaisa hai?
